files.detail: Cognition compression — replaced 10 flat pass-through functions with 6 multi-source cognition surface derivation functions. projection_type changed to COMPRESSED_SW_INTEL_COGNITION. Primary output: surfaces[] array. Preserved execution_corridors + qualification_cognition + qualification_decomposition for orchestration backward compat. 594 → 424 lines

Replaced 7 flat-list panels (AttentionPanel, PressurePanel, ExecutionCorridorPanel, CoordinationSpinePanel, TopologyRolesPanel, DeploymentRiskPanel, RoleAbstractionsPanel) with CognitionSurfaceCard + CognitionSurfaceDetail + PeakSeverityStrip. All 4 view exports rewritten to consume surfaces[]. 408 → 295 lines

Added sw-intel-surface-* CSS block (180+ rules) for cognition surface rendering: surface cards, severity borders, expandable detail, propagation chain visualization, peak severity strip, boardroom/balanced surface variants. Fixed balanced section title flex layout
